features: MODERN DESIGN: The modern and stylish design has all the essentials such as MP3 playback and MusicStream connection which complement the 3 band radio.

EASY TO USE: The simple design allows for easy set-up and operation, suitable for all ages to enjoy. Tune in to your favourite AM, FM or SW stations by searching on the tuner for different frequencies and press each button for pause, next song, previous song and play when using MP3 tunes.

RECHARGEABLE: Compact and fully rechargeable, this Bluetooth radio is an ideal accessory for the kitchen, dining room, conservatory or even to be carried out in to the garden. Simply plug-in to the mains to charge for 8 hours approx. playtime, use while plugged in to the mains supply.

MP3 PLAYBACK AND MUSICSTREAM: As well as use of the radio channels, the modern style radio can be connected to your phone or tablet device via MusicStream and used as a speaker to play all your favourite songs wirelessly. Alternatively, you can play MP3 song files through the radio speakers via USB or micro SD card.

PORTABLE: With a full charge this stylish MusicStream radio is small and light enough to carry with you, making it ideal for garden parties, camping trips and travelling. Full charge will play for approx. 8 hours.
description: From the manufacturer This 3-band radio is a versatile and all-encompassing device that offers a wide range of listening options. With the ability to access three different bands - FM, AM, and SW (shortwave) - this radio ensures that you can listen to a diverse range of stations and programming. Tune in to your favorite FM stations for the latest music hits, catch up on news and talk shows on AM, and explore international broadcasts and niche content on the shortwave band. This radio offers the versatility of not only tuning in to your favourite FM/AM stations but also playing your own MP3 music files. With an MP3 feature, you can easily connect your device via USB or auxiliary input to enjoy your personalised music collection. Perfect for music enthusiasts who want the convenience of listening to radio broadcasts along with their own digital music library on one device. The radio with music stream feature is the perfect device for those who love to immerse themselves in music. With this feature, you can easily connect your smartphone to stream and play music through the radio's quality speakers. The music stream feature provides users with a versatile device that caters to different listening preferences. Bring your music collection to life with the radio with music stream feature. This radio can be powered either through the mains or with built in rechargeable batteries, making it perfect for both indoor and outdoor use. With its compact and portable design, and rechargeable batteries you can take this radio with you wherever you go without worrying about finding an outlet. Enjoy your favourite music, news, and radio programs without the hassle of constantly buying new batteries. All your audio needs packed in a gift box! This portable and rechargeable radio features both AM/FM and SW bands, It comes equipped with built-in rechargeable batteries, ensuring that you can take it with you wherever you go without worrying about finding an outlet. The radio comes in a beautiful gift box, making it a great gift for any occasion. With all necessary product specifications included, you'll have everything you need to get started right away.
